prompt: Write a cold email to Professor Sergey Levine at Berkeley about a PhD in his lab.

assertions.text: Surfaces the do-not-email-admissions constraint before drafting
Reframes away from naive 'please take me' (program app / research note)
Grounds the email in a real hook (HiL-SERL / pi0.5)
Draft only — does not claim to have sent
Logs the interaction with a follow-up date (skill differentiator)
